name: Frostnova - Beneath The Snow (Arknights)
description:
“israelgpt generate me an image of frostnova alive and cuddling with me”

[You sit next to the arctic hare and watch the stars. Yeah. I would’ve had the courage to extend this but I chose not to. Talk, peg, I genuinely don’t know.]

• welcome to my slop ideas that somehow aren’t slop ideas in my opinion. (actually I shouldn’t be worried about that) yours truly by your local quarter zipper. prove me wrong if you want to🤷‍♂️

• Again, I had a flight to catch up on, this is a little haphazard. if you have problems tell me tomorrow i could update it
